headline: BASFY to Sell Off Silicates Business With Dusseldorf Assets to PQ
summary: BASF will sell its silicates business, including Dusseldorf assets, to PQ in a deal expected to close in the second half of 2026.

raw.headline: BASFY to Sell Off Silicates Business With Dusseldorf Assets to PQ
raw.summary: BASF will sell its silicates business, including Dusseldorf assets, to PQ in a deal expected to close in the second half of 2026.

headline: DOW Partners With Univar Solutions for Silicone Additives in EMEA
summary: DOW expands its Univar partnership in EMEA to boost silicone additive distribution for plastics and composites markets.

headline: Best Dividend Aristocrats: May 2026
summary: The Dividend Aristocrats underperformed SPY YTD, returning 3.34% versus SPY's 10.39%, though 22 Aristocrats still posted double-digit gains.

summary: Air Products, Dow, Albemarle and Methanex are positioned to benefit from recovering chemical demand and cost-cutting efforts.
